title: thonningia janeirensis
intro: Thonningia janeirensis, also known as janeira or janeirense, is a plant species in the family Thymelaeaceae, native to Brazil. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thonningia janeirensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
